_meta.methodology: BUILD_PROCESS.md (14-param + principles + functional/security/concurrency tests); P0.7 zero-debt

title: Lead Import (CR-A): downloadable template + CSV file import + real import-batch (validate/dedupe/report), fixing the silent-insert debt
business_reason: Today's Import is a paste-textarea that posts 4 columns and inserts raw rows missing NOT-NULL fields (lead_code/country/state/lead_source/stage/lead_status/...); the catch{} swallows the failure so it reports success and persists nothing (P4.5 — error debt under P0.7). It also ignores import_policy (file formats, required columns, validation/invalid report, duplicate report, audited batch) and the canonical school_lead_import_batches entity entirely. CR-A makes Import correct: a downloadable CSV template, CSV file upload, server-side validate + dedupe + full-field insert, and a persisted, audited batch with reports.
scope_note: CR 1 of a set. CR-A (this): template + CSV import + batch + validate/dedupe/insert + fix silent insert. Queued: CR-B large-import (>=5000) approval + staged upload/validate/approve/import workflow; CR-C duplicate review/merge (possible_duplicate, merge_requires_reason); XLSX format (needs a SheetJS dependency) folds into CR-B.

drift_findings_step3.canonical_batch: school_lead_import_batches: batch_code (LIMP-[0-9]{8}), source_file (uuid file — drift-flagged NULLABLE, so no storage blocker in CR-A), import_format (csv|xlsx), uploaded_by, default_lead_owner_id, total_rows/valid_rows/invalid_rows/duplicate_rows, validation_report (jsonb, restricted), duplicate_report (jsonb, restricted), status (uploaded|validated|validation_failed|imported|partially_imported|cancelled|archived).
drift_findings_step3.import_policy: required_import_columns school_name,city,state,country,lead_source; supported_formats csv,xlsx; import_validation_required; invalid_rows_report_required; duplicate_detection_on_import; import_batch_audited; large_import_requires_approval_threshold_rows 5000.
drift_findings_step3.duplicate_policy: duplicate_keys normalized_school_name+city+state, email, phone, website, normalized_address (findDuplicates already covers name/city/state/email/phone/website).
drift_findings_step3.workflow: lead_import_lifecycle (workflows.json): uploaded -> validated -> imported/partially_imported, with validation_failed/cancelled. CR-A walks the batch to a terminal status in one synchronous call; the staged transitions surface in CR-B with the approval gate.
drift_findings_step3.current_bug: importLeads inserts raw parsed rows (missing required NOT-NULL columns) and swallows the error (P4.5); importConfig.columns = [school_name,city,email,phone] (missing required state/country/lead_source).

param_14.question: Provide a downloadable import template and a CSV file import that validates, dedupes, inserts full-field leads, and records an audited import batch with reports.
param_14.answer: Add a 'Download template' (client-side CSV: required+recommended headers + example row). Replace the paste-textarea with a CSV file picker (header-mapped parse, count preview). Server importLeads: validate each row vs required_columns (-> valid/invalid + validation_report), dedupe valid rows per duplicate_policy (-> duplicate_report), insert unique-valid via a SHARED buildLeadRow (same mapping as createLead: lead_code, normalized_school_name, stage=new_lead, lead_status=active, created_by, etc.), capture per-row insert errors in the report (no silent swallow), create a school_lead_import_batches row (LIMP- code, format, uploaded_by, default_lead_owner_id, counts, reports, terminal status), audit it.
param_14.data_entities: writes: school_leads (bulk), school_lead_import_batches (1 per import), audit_events
param_14.security_implications: Import is staff-write (requireStaffScope school_crm write) + X-Idempotency-Key required (replay-safe batch). created_by/lead_code/normalized_*/stage/lead_status are server-set (P3.9 — never from the CSV). validation_report/duplicate_report are restricted jsonb (returned only to the importing staff). default_lead_owner_id is a server-validated field. Template download is client-side (no data leaves).
param_14.approval_implications: large imports (>=5000 rows) require approval — DEFERRED to CR-B; CR-A imports proceed directly.
param_14.downstream_dependencies: buildLeadRow is shared by createLead + importLeads (P0.6) so single-create and bulk-import can never diverge on field mapping. XLSX needs a parser dependency (queued).
param_14.assumptions: CSV has a header row matching template column names (order-independent). Rows missing any required column are 'invalid' (not inserted), reported, not fatal. Duplicates are skipped (review/merge is CR-C).

principles_pass.template_columns: P1.4 — template = required_import_columns + recommended (the ones buildLeadRow maps); required marked; one example row
principles_pass.required_columns: P1.4/P2.x — validate vs import_policy.required_import_columns (school_name,city,state,country,lead_source), not the old 4
principles_pass.server_set_fields: P2.4/P3.9 — lead_code (code:LEAD), normalized_school_name, stage, lead_status, created_by set server-side; never from CSV
principles_pass.reuse_mapping: P0.6/P0.5 — extract buildLeadRow from create.row; createLead + importLeads both call it (no divergence, no new schema)
principles_pass.silent_failure: P4.5/P0.7 — drop the swallowing catch; per-row insert errors captured in validation/duplicate report + batch counts; nothing reported as imported that wasn't
principles_pass.batch_record: P2.x — persist school_lead_import_batches (LIMP- code P2.4, counts, jsonb reports, terminal status) — import_batch_audited
principles_pass.dedupe: P3.11 — duplicate_policy is binding; reuse findDuplicates; duplicates -> duplicate_report, skipped
principles_pass.reports_masking: P2.10 — validation_report/duplicate_report restricted; returned to importer only
principles_pass.scope: P3.8 — staff-write; created leads carry created_by=actor

functional: valid rows insert with full server fields (lead_code LEAD-, stage new_lead, lead_status active, created_by)
rows missing a required column -> invalid, not inserted, in validation_report
duplicates vs existing -> skipped, in duplicate_report
batch record created with correct counts + terminal status (imported / partially_imported / validation_failed)
buildLeadRow parity: a single createLead row and an imported row have identical mapped fields
security_owasp: A03: a CSV cell with formula/script text is stored verbatim (no interpretation/CSV-injection on our side)
A09: every import writes an audited batch (non-repudiation)
concurrency: two parallel imports -> two batches with DISTINCT batch_code (P2.4 under interleaving)
idempotency-key replay collapses to one batch (P3.7) — route-level
